alice ma.

management consultant and builder

github linkedin resume email

hi! I'm Alice. I'm a management consultant in Amsterdam, advising companies on strategic decisions that move the needle. My recent projects have been in M&A (due diligence), market entry, and long-term strategic planning.

I studied Computer Science and Commerce at Queen's University, have a Canadian CPA designation, and used my INSEAD MBA to help me pivot role, geography, and industry all at once.

currently:

  • doing strategy work by day, looking for excuses to write Python by night (and sometimes also by day)
  • building (and teaching) data tooling internally at my office (Tableau, Alteryx, PowerBI)
  • learning Dutch (slowly), practicing French, and not letting my Chinese rust in the meanwhile
  • reading about food — currently: Ten Tomatoes that Changed the World by W. Alexander
  • recovering varsity fencer (will lunge if provoked)

skills

PythonSQLGit

projects

SoftwarePythonWeb development

Fook

An attachment for any metallic eating utensil that reminds the eater to slow down when they eat too fast.

HardwareCircuit designPrototyping

What to Wear?

Web application that suggests a colour co-ordinated outfit based on items available in a users's wardrobe and the forecasted weather of their location.

PythonJavascriptGoogle Datastore
